data.description:
## Summary

The `optionality` GitHub Actions workflow fails on every push to `main` (job
"clean core wheel (no extras → heavy deps absent)"). `src/rebar/llm/failure.py`
imports `httpx` and `pydantic_ai.exceptions` at **module scope**, so importing
the module in a no-extras (core-only) install raises
`ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'pydantic_ai'` — breaking the lean-runtime
optionality contract (extras may only ADD deps; core must import with none).

It reached `main` because the Gerrit `Verified` gate (gerrit-verify.yaml) installs
`.[dev]` -> `[agents]` (heavy stack present), so the module-scope import succeeds
there; and the static AST guard that SHOULD catch it
(`tests/unit/test_core_optionality.py::test_no_core_module_imports_heavy_stack_at_module_scope`,
which DOES run inside `make test` = the Verified suite) has a stale `_HEAVY` list
from the LangChain era — it is missing `pydantic_ai` and `httpx`, the actual
runtime heavy deps after the pydantic-ai cutover.

## Reproduction Steps

1. Build the core wheel with no extras, install into a clean venv
   (`python -m build --wheel && pip install dist/*.whl`).
2. `python -c "import rebar.llm.failure"`.

- Expected: import succeeds (core stays lean; heavy imports are lazy).
- Actual: `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'pydantic_ai'` at
  `src/rebar/llm/failure.py:27`; optionality clean-core-wheel job reports
  `8 failed, 11 passed`.

## Root Cause

- `failure.py` module-scope `import httpx` + `from pydantic_ai.exceptions import (...)`.
- `_HEAVY` in `tests/unit/test_core_optionality.py` omits `pydantic_ai`/`httpx`,
  so the in-Verified static guard never flagged the offender.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `src/rebar/llm/failure.py` performs NO module-scope import of `httpx` or
      `pydantic_ai`; those imports are lazy (function-local), matching the
      established pattern in `runner.py`. Type annotations remain valid under
      `from __future__ import annotations`.
- [ ] `classify_llm_failure(...)` still classifies correctly WITH the agents
      extra present, and degrades safely (returns NEEDS_INVESTIGATION, never
      raises ModuleNotFoundError) when the heavy stack is ABSENT.
- [ ] `_HEAVY` in `tests/unit/test_core_optionality.py` includes `pydantic_ai`
      and `httpx`, so the static module-scope guard catches this regression class.
- [ ] The AST guard fails on the unfixed code (RED) and passes after the fix (GREEN).
- [ ] The optionality workflow clean-core-wheel job passes (module imports under
      a no-extras install).
- [ ] Decision recorded on the Gerrit Verified path: the module-scope-heavy-import
      guard is confirmed to run inside the Verified suite via the AST test; the
      residual clean-wheel/packaging jobs are justified as post-merge (or wired in).
- [ ] `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass locally.
data.title: optionality CI red on main: src/rebar/llm/failure.py imports pydantic_ai/httpx at module scope
